briefdescription.para: XCframe_LookupConfig returns a reference to an XCframe_Config structure based on the unique device id, DeviceId.

detaileddescription.para: The return value will refer to an entry in the device configuration table defined in the xcframe_g.c file.

parameterdescription.para: is the unique device ID of the device for the lookup operation.

simplesect.para: CfgPtr is a reference to a config record in the configuration table (in xcframe_g.c) corresponding to DeviceId, or NULL if no match is found.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes an CFRAME core.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using an CFRAME driver.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCframe instance.
is a reference to a structure containing information about a specific XCframe instance.

is the device base address in the virtual memory address space. The caller is responsible for keeping the address mapping from EffectiveAddr to the device physical base address unchanged once this function is invoked. Unexpected errors may occur if the address mapping changes after this function is called. If address translation is not used, pass in the physical address instead.

briefdescription.para: This function runs a self-test on the driver and hardware device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCframe instance.

memberdef.argsstring: (const XCframe *InstancePtr, u32 AddrOffset, XCframe_FrameNo FrameNo, const Xuint128 *Val)
memberdef.name: XCframe_WriteReg

briefdescription.para: This function writes to 128 bit CFRAME register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCframe instance.
is offset of the Cframe register
is the index of frame
is pointer to the value to be written

briefdescription.para: This function writes the value to CFRAME cmd register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCframe instance.
is the index of frame
to be initiated by CFRAME block

briefdescription.para: This function writes the VGG TRIM value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCframe instance.
is pointer to the TRIM value

briefdescription.para: This function writes the CRAM TRIM value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCframe instance.
is to hold CRAM TRIM value

briefdescription.para: This function writes the BRAM TRIM value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCframe instance.
is to hold BRAM TRIM value

briefdescription.para: This function writes the BRAM TRIM value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCframe instance.
is to hold URAM TRIM value

memberdef.argsstring: (const XCframe *InstancePtr, XCframe_FrameNo CframeNo, u32 CframeLen, u32 FrameAddr)
memberdef.name: XCframe_SetReadParam

briefdescription.para: This function sets the CFRAME read parameters with mentioned CFRAME length and frame number.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCframe instance.
is the index of frame
is total length of Cframes
is frame address

memberdef.argsstring: (const XCframe *InstancePtr, u32 AddrOffset, XCframe_FrameNo FrameNo, u32 *ValPtr)
memberdef.name: XCframe_ReadReg

briefdescription.para: This function reads the 128 bit CFRAME register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCframe instance.
is offset of the Cframe register
is the index of frame
128 bit variable to store the read data

briefdescription.para: This function clears CFRAME ISRs and is called as part of CFRAME error recovery.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCframe instance

memberdef.argsstring: (const XCframe *InstancePtr, u32 AddrOffset, XCframe_FrameNo FrameNo, const Xuint128 *Val)
memberdef.name: XCframe_SafetyWriteReg

briefdescription.para: This function writes to 128 bit CFRAME register and reads it back to validate the write operation.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCframe instance.
is offset of the Cframe register
is the index of frame
is pointer to the value to be written

briefdescription.para: This function returns the last Cframe address of given cframeno and blocktype.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCframe instance
is block type
is the index of cframe

briefdescription.para: This is the file which contains header files related to CFRAME block.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 kc 12/21/2017 Initial release 1.01 bsv 06/11/2019 Added XCframe_ClearCframeErr API 1.02 bsv 17/02/2020 XCframe_SafetyWriteReg API added 1.03 bsv 07/15/2021 Fix doxygen warnings 1.04 ng 06/30/23 Added support for system device tree flow 1.5 mss 09/04/2023 Fixed MISRA-C violation 4.6 mss 09/04/2023 Fixed MISRA-C violation 8.13 pre 08/22/2024 Added XCframe_GetLastFrameAddr function and modified XCframe_SetReadParam function 2.0 ng 03/26/2026 Fixed doxygen warnings
